summary: Comprehensive testing of Multiverse Realms, Spiritual Avatar Creator, and Equipment System features. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly.

minor.issue: Was returning 404 for characters without equipment_collection field (older characters). Fixed by checking character existence separately.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Multiverse Realms, Spiritual Avatar Creator, and Equipment System features are working. Backend tests cover: realms API (4 realms, unlock status), realm detail, exploration, gem collection, equipment system, crafting recipes, portal status, and avatar builder (catalog, save, my-avatar). Frontend verified: Starseed Adventure nav buttons, Starseed Worlds page with 4 tabs (Realms, Gems, Equipment, Crafting), star map with realm nodes, realm detail panel with explore button, exploration results modal, and Spiritual Avatar Creator with 6 builder steps and selection cards.

multiverse_realms.GET /api/starseed/worlds/realms: PASS - Returns 4 realms with correct unlock status
multiverse_realms.GET /api/starseed/worlds/realm/astral-sa: PASS - Returns detailed realm info with unique gems/equipment
multiverse_realms.POST /api/starseed/worlds/explore: PASS - Returns discoveries with XP gained
multiverse_realms.GET /api/starseed/worlds/crafting-recipe: PASS - Returns 6 recipes and 3 enchant options
multiverse_realms.GET /api/starseed/worlds/portals/{origin: PASS - Returns portal status with progress

avatar_builder.GET /api/starseed/avatar-builder/catalog: PASS - Returns 6 categories with level-gated options

frontend.starseed_adventure: PASS - Nav buttons for Cosmic Realm, Multiverse, Avatar Creator visible

starseed_worlds.tabs: PASS - 4 tabs visible (Realms, Gems, Equipment, Crafting)
starseed_worlds.star_map: PASS - 4 realm nodes visible (1 unlocked, 3 locked)
starseed_worlds.realm_detail: PASS - Detail panel shows lore and explore button
starseed_worlds.exploration: PASS - Explore button triggers exploration with XP and discoveries
starseed_worlds.gems_tab: PASS - Shows collected gems (3 gems found)
starseed_worlds.crafting_tab: PASS - Shows 6 recipes with material requirements

spiritual_avatar.builder_steps: PASS - 6 steps visible (Base Form, Aura, Cosmic Features, Markings, Accessories, Background)
spiritual_avatar.selection_cards: PASS - 8 options for Base Form, clickable with check marks
spiritual_avatar.generate_button: PASS - Generate Spiritual Avatar button visible
